title: Create a Visual Representation of a Time Series Data
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a high-quality visual representation of a time series data. The plot should include a clear title, axis labels, and data points. The output should be a PNG image.
constraints: Must use a timestamp on the x-axis

evaluationCriteria.description: The clarity and resolution of the generated image.
The use of consistent colors throughout the image, including axis labels, title, and data points.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
